titles.title: I Just Want To Be Where You Are

authors.author: Don Moen
Don Moen
Herr, ich möchte nah bei dir sein

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I just want to be where You are, Dwelling daily in Your presence I don't want to worship from afar, Draw me near to where You are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I just want to be where You are, In Your dwelling place forever Take me to the place where You are, I just want to be with You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want to be where You are, Dwelling in Your presence Feasting at Your table, Surrounded by Your glory In Your presence, That's where I always want to be I just want to be, I just want to be with You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I just want to be where You are, To enter boldly in Your presence I don't want to worship from afar, Draw me near to where You are

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, my God, You are my strength and my song And when I'm in Your presence Though I'm weak You're always strong

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I just want to be I just want to be with You
